html:
Exclusive to:  

In Shipwrecked compatible worlds, the Broken AAC Device has a rare chance of being found when digging up a grave. AAC stands for "Augmentative and Alternative Communication".

The Broken AAC Device can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_23".

×10

×11

×3

40

:
Miscellaneous
"trinket_23"
Exclusive to:
“Someone lost their words.”
–Wilson
“Broken what?”
–Willow
“Is very broken.”
–Wolfgang
“How unfortunate.”
–Wendy
“OF COURSE IT'S BROKEN, IT'S MISSING A DR356X001”
–WX-78
“Don't step on it!”
–Wickerbottom
“I got no idea what that is.”
–Woodie
“It's not communicating with anyone now.”
–Maxwell
“Ah. It needs a DR356X001.”
–Wagstaff
“A bröken sömething.”
–Wigfrid
“Where did the words go?”
–Webber
“Too much work to figure out what this does...”
–Walani
“What an interesting contraption.”
–Warly
“Even if it weren't broken, me wouldn't be knowing whut to do wit' it.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS CRACK'D”
–Wilba
“Green stick glass”
–Wormwood
“Interesting... I don't know what it is.”
–Wheeler
In Shipwrecked compatible worlds, the Broken AAC Device has a rare chance of being found when digging up a grave. AAC stands for "Augmentative and Alternative Communication".
The Broken AAC Device can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_23".
